export ANON_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyAgCiAgICAicm9sZSI6ICJhbm9uIiwKICAgICJpc3MiOiAic3VwYWJhc2UtZGVtbyIsCiAgICAiaWF0IjogMTY0MTc2OTIwMCwKICAgICJleHAiOiAxNzk5NTM1NjAwCn0.dc_X5iR_VP_qT0zsiyj_I_OZ2T9FtRU2BBNWN8Bu4GE"
export SERVICE_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyAgCiAgICAicm9sZSI6ICJzZXJ2aWNlX3JvbGUiLAogICAgImlzcyI6ICJzdXBhYmFzZS1kZW1vIiwKICAgICJpYXQiOiAxNjQxNzY5MjAwLAogICAgImV4cCI6IDE3OTk1MzU2MDAKfQ.DaYlNEoUrrEn2Ig7tqibS-PHK5vgusbcbo7X36XVt4Q"
export SUPABASE="https://supabase-example.rebelsoft.com"
export HEADER1="apikey:$ANON_KEY"
export HEADER2="Authorization:Bearer $SERVICE_KEY"
export HEADER3="Authorization:Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..OdjixEnwF-oWjGd12nwjQAFiMllzmow3NeJlEL3FAEg"

# select todos
http "$SUPABASE/rest/v1/todos?select=*&order=id.asc" "$HEADER1" "$HEADER3"

# uid
http "$SUPABASE/rest/v1/rpc/uid" "$HEADER1" "$HEADER3"
# current_setting
http "$SUPABASE/rest/v1/rpc/current_setting?name=request.jwt.claim.sub"  "$HEADER1" "$HEADER3"
http "$SUPABASE/rest/v1/rpc/version" "$HEADER1" "$HEADER3"

# current settings
create or replace function current_setting(name text, field text) returns text as $$
  select nullif(pg_catalog.current_setting(name, true), '')::json->>field;
$$ language sql stable;

# create user
echo '{"email": "email@example.com","password": "secret"}' | http $SUPABASE/auth/v1/signup "$HEADER1" "$HEADER2"

# storage
http storage.supabase-example:5000/bucket "$HEADER2"
# list buckets
http $SUPABASE/storage/v1/bucket "$HEADER2"
# create bucket
echo '{ "name": "avatars2" }' | http $SUPABASE/storage/v1/bucket "$HEADER2"
# list objects
echo '{ "prefix": "" }' | http $SUPABASE/storage/v1/object/list/avatars2 "$HEADER2"
# upload file
http $SUPABASE/storage/v1/object/avatars2/myfile "$HEADER2" < /home/projector-user/IdeaProjects/terraform-k8s-modules/examples/supabase/README.md

## schema diff
docker run –-platform linux/amd64 djrobstep/migra migra \
  'postgres://postgres:postgres@postgres.supabase-example:5432/postgres' \
  'postgres://postgres:postgres@postgres.postgres-example:5432/postgres'

docker run supabase/pgadmin-schema-diff \
  'postgres://postgres:postgres@postgres.supabase-example:5432/postgres' \
  'postgres://postgres:postgres@postgres.postgres-example:5432/postgres'

docker run --pull always supabase/pgadmin-schema-diff \
  --source-schema public \
  --target-schema public \
  'postgres://postgres:postgres@postgres.postgres-example:5432/postgres' \
  'postgres://cloud_admin:cloud_admin@postgres.neon-example:55433/postgres'
